client.name: The SD Group
client.tagline: Real estate with strategy, service, and results.
client.launchContext: Newly licensed, officially began client work 2/25/2026. Emphasis on intentional growth, systems, and relational service.
differentiators: Bilingual service — English & Spanish (rare in luxury Bergen County segment)
KW Village Square support structure (contracts, compliance, marketing, TC)
Warm, refined, personal service with fresh-perspective energy

champagne.role: Single accent: rules, hover underlines, CTA borders, signature elements

moss.role: Secondary accent: Bergen botanical tie-in, dividers, EN/ES toggle inactive

softWhite.role: Card surfaces, typography over dark imagery

display.usage: Headlines, section titles, founder name, editorial callouts

body.usage: Body copy, navigation, UI labels, listing data (tabular nums)

brand.logoDescription: SD monogram — interlocking serif S and D as a single inline SVG mark, referenced from <defs>. Wordmark 'THE SD GROUP' in Geist 500 letter-spacing 0.3em all-caps beneath (optional combo lockup). Color inherits via currentColor for theme adaptability. Nav size 44px monogram-only; footer size 64px full lockup.

logoVariants.name: lockup
logoVariants.form: SD monogram + THE SD GROUP wordmark

logoVariants.name: favicon
logoVariants.form: Monogram inline SVG, Champagne on Ink

brand.bilingualStrategy: Every section has EN+ES copy. Toggle persists via localStorage. Default to EN with browser-language auto-detect for first visit. /es URL path for Spanish-canonical indexing.

pipeline.scope: Full pipeline incl. bilingual voice agent
pipeline.domainStatus: Registered at Namecheap on 2026-04-17 (assumed owned by Juan/Sarah)
pipeline.photoStrategy: Instagram scrape blocked — fallback: editorial silhouette placeholder generated via Gemini in Phase 6. Sarah can drop pro headshots into site/assets/images/sarah-*.jpg post-launch and the site will pick them up.
pipeline.credentialsDisplay: Omit NAHREP; lead with bilingual EN/ES

signaturePosts: Seashore at Long Branch open-house recap (14-unit new-construction, private elevators, rooftop ocean views)
Official KW onboarding — Realtor safety + professional standards
Preparation philosophy: studying contracts, learning systems, building strategy
